title: Legislative oversight of corporation rules and regulations
doc_html:
§9019. Legislative oversight of corporation rules and regulations

           Legislative oversight of corporation rules and regulations shall be in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 49:966.

           Acts 1990, No. 1045, §1, eff. Nov. 7, 1990; Acts 1995, No. 1022, §1, eff. June 29, 1995.
doc_text:
§9019.  Legislative oversight of corporation rules and regulations
Legislative oversight of corporation rules and regulations shall be in
accordance with the provisions of R.S. 49:966.
Acts 1990, No. 1045, §1, eff. Nov. 7, 1990; Acts 1995, No. 1022, §1,
eff. June 29, 1995.
